/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/db_benchmarks.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/db_benchmarks.dir/db_benchmark.cpp.o -o db_benchmarks  ../src/libcore_lib.a ../_deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/libSDL3_ttf.so.0.2.2 /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.12 ../_deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
